Lithic Lab

Zoom Extents

Tools

Source Library

Barrel and Groin remain built-in test sources. Uploaded models become the source geometry for additional vaults, walls, columns, and assemblies.

Uploaded Model Source

Source Model Workflow Import a mesh, project block strategies onto its surface, then use optional 2D layouts or UV grids to control the stereotomy.
For best results, provide named/separate meshes such as intrados, extrados, ribs, columns, walls, springing guides, and support zones. Rhino 3DM remains planned for future support.
Source Transform
Pipeline idle.
